# Figures from the Document

## Figure 1.6. Alien temporary work permits, Thailand

*Source: Department of Employment, Thailand (2022)*

## Figure 1.7. Non-citizen population in Malaysia (in thousands)

| Year | Non-citizen population in Malaysia (thousands) |
| --- | --- |
| 2016 | 3,230 |
| 2017 | 3,288 |
| 2018 | 3,323 |
| 2019 | 3,140 |
| 2020 | 2,907 |
| 2021 | 2,693 |

*Source: Department of Statistics, Malaysia (2022). Figure for 2021 is an estimate.*

## Figure 1.8. Singapore foreign workforce stock (in thousands)

| Year | Singapore foreign workforce stock (thousands) |
| --- | --- |
| 2016 (Dec) | 1,393 |
| 2017 (Dec) | 1,368 |
| 2018 (Dec) | 1,386 |
| 2019 (Dec) | 1,427 |
| 2020 (Dec) | 1,232 |
| 2021 (Dec) | 1,200 |

*Source: Compilation by Manpower Research & Statistics Department (Ministry of Manpower, Singapore, 2022).*
